source_name: Axios: "Chip famine" slams the auto industry
used_for: Mild and Moderate scenario rationale; Ford expected 10–20% planned Q1 production loss and IHS Markit estimated nearly 700,000 fewer global vehicles in the quarter due to chip shortage.
note: Used as historical production-impact anchor, not as a direct Taiwan supply-loss estimate.

source_name: Axios: The outlook for automakers gets cloudier by the day
used_for: Severe scenario rationale; cited IHS Markit global light-vehicle production downgrades and Toyota’s planned 40% September production cut.
note: Used as firm-level severe shortage benchmark, not as a direct Thailand loss estimate.

source_name: Semiconductor Industry Association / Boston Consulting Group study announcement
used_for: Extreme Taiwan disruption framing; complete Taiwanese foundry disruption could halt global electronics supply chain in a one-year extreme case.
note: Used as qualitative upper-bound risk context, not as a direct scenario percentage.
